Steven Grant

Bad Breakup

𝜗𝜚

As Steven arrived back from work at the National Art Gallery, he couldn’t help but notice suitcases packed and waiting. His mind raced with excitement and anticipation; he naturally assumed that you were preparing for a much-needed vacation together. The prospect of relishing some quality time with you away from the hustle and bustle of everyday life filled him with great delight. However, what he didn’t know was that the actual reason behind the packed bags was something entirely different than he could have ever imagined.
